packs.concept_key: this document outlines the interconnected dependencies and implementation phases required to deliver pure’s journey mapping recommendation engine and brand refresh. it incorporates cta orchestration, sitemap optimization, configurator strategy, page simplification, personalization, design system updates, and asset production practices. each element ties back to our guiding principles: simplicity, clarity, modularity, and persona-driven orchestration.
packs.concept_title: This document outlines the interconnected dependencies and implementation phases required to deliver Pure’s journey mapping recommendation engine and brand refresh. It incorporates CTA orchestration, sitemap optimization, configurator strategy, page simplification, personalization, design system updates, and asset production practices. Each element ties back to our guiding principles: simplicity, clarity, modularity, and persona-driven orchestration.
